title: Sphaerocionium palmense
taxonomy: Sphaerocionium palmense is classified as a species of liverwort in the family Sphaerocionitaceae. This classification places it within the larger group of plants known as non-vascular cryptogams. The Sphaerocionitaceae family is part of the class Marchantiopsida, which includes various species of liverworts and their relatives. The order Marchantes is the higher taxonomic group to which Sphaerocionium palmense belongs. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae.
